title: i want more ores
description: Expand your arsenal! "I Want More Ores" brings a variety of new equipment tiers to Minecraft, giving you more choices for your survival journey.
body:
# About the Mod

This mod is designed for players who feel the vanilla equipment progression is too limited. It introduces multiple new material tiers, each with its own full set of armor, weapons, and tools. Whether you want to use your spare emeralds or hunt for rare onyx, this mod has you covered!

## 🛠️ New Equipment Tiers

Upgrade your gameplay with complete kits for the following materials:

Copper: A great early-game bridge between stone and iron.

Silver: A specialized tier with unique utility.

Emerald: Finally, a way to turn your trading riches into powerful gear.

Ruby: A classic, high-performance alternative to diamond.

Onyx: Premium, high-tier equipment for late-game durability.

Obsidian: Incredibly tough and resistant, perfect for heavy combat.

Key Features

Full Armor & Tool Sets: Every material includes a complete set of Armor (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots) and all basic Tools (Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe).

Enhanced Variety: Perfect for players who want more aesthetic and functional choices for their equipment.

Balanced Progression: Each tier is balanced to fit naturally into the game's power c
